Get your AI tool discovered.

Choose the right plan to showcase your product to thousands of AI professionals. From free basic listings to premium featured placements with verified badges.

Why get verified?

Verified tools get 3x more clicks, appear in our newsletter to 5,000+ subscribers, and rank higher in search results. Build trust with the AI community.

For tool creators

Whether you're a startup or an established SaaS, our listing tiers are designed to match your growth stage and marketing budget.

  • — No newsletter feature

Frequently Asked Questions

What does the verification process involve?

Our editorial team reviews your tool's functionality, documentation, pricing transparency, and user experience. Verified tools meet our quality standards for usefulness, reliability, and value. The process typically takes 3-5 business days.

Can I upgrade my plan later?

Yes. You can start with a free listing and upgrade to Enhanced, Verified, or Featured at any time. The verification fee ($297) is a one-time payment that covers the editorial review and permanent badge.

How does the newsletter feature work?

Verified and Featured tools are included in our weekly newsletter sent to 5,000+ AI professionals. Verified tools get one feature; Featured tools get bi-weekly spotlights with dedicated sections.

What payment methods do you accept?

We accept all major credit cards via Stripe. Enhanced and Featured plans are billed monthly. The Verified plan is a one-time payment with no recurring charges.

Do you offer refunds?

Enhanced and Featured subscriptions can be cancelled anytime. The verification fee is non-refundable once the editorial review has begun. If your tool doesn't pass verification, we'll provide feedback and one free re-review.

Ready to list your tool?

Join hundreds of AI tools already listed on Agentic AI Tools. Start with a free listing and upgrade when you're ready.
